sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66300" key="*merida/rpac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Μερῐδ-άρπαξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n66300.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Bit-stealer</tr_>, name of a mouse in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:260" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">260</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
